recent_no_license_projects.name: mcp-stata
recent_no_license_projects.summary: A lightweight Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Stata. Execute commands, inspect data, retrieve stored results (`r()`/`e()`), and view graphs in your chat interface. Built for economists who want to integrate LLM assistance into their Stata workflow.
